assets.purpose: Deterministic JSON-Schema contract for a .jm-adk.local.json setup plan; the offline validator checks plans against it.
Hard-gate scoring of a setup plan: dry-run default, secret containment, overwrite guard, offline determinism, policy completeness, git safety, evidence governance.
Pre-apply, write-safety, and governance gate checklist run before any write to .jm-adk.local.json.
